chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Suit No.B-16 of 2005 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 1. For order on CMA No. 14408/2024 (Urgent) 2. For order on CMA No. 14409/2024 (Withdrawal of suit) 23.10.2024 Mr. Nasir Rizwan Advocate for the Plaintiff Mr. Muhammad Ilyas Advocate for Defendant.-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2. CMA No. 14409/2024: This is an application for unconditional withdrawal of the suit. Learned counsel for the Defendant Bank is present confirm the contents of application. Application is allowed. Accordingly suit is dismissed as withdrawn. JUDGE Amjad PS
